default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on ME training content to prevent duplication.](https://fathom.video/share/fRd3yGsxAabJwJy2ybJ_BN5AhvSijTUu?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Ownership:** Sydney will create all Sprint ME training modules, owning the process end-to-end. Marisol will focus on Growth Execution ME training.](https://fathom.video/share/fRd3yGsxAabJwJy2ybJ_BN5AhvSijTUu?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)
  - [**Sprint Process Overhaul:** The Sprint ME workflow is being revamped to integrate MEs into strategy (80% EM, 20% ME) and accelerate content delivery (3 articles by W3, 5 by W4).](https://fathom.video/share/fRd3yGsxAabJwJy2ybJ_BN5AhvSijTUu?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**Training Doc Updates Required:** Marisol must update existing Sprint EM training documents to reflect the new process changes.](https://fathom.video/share/fRd3yGsxAabJwJy2ybJ_BN5AhvSijTUu?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
  - [**Notion Structure:** Sydney will create a "SprintME" group in the `Training Modules` database to house the new content.](https://fathom.video/share/fRd3yGsxAabJwJy2ybJ_BN5AhvSijTUu?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Preventing Content Duplication

  - [Marisol's detailed Notion setup prompted this meeting to align on ME training content and prevent duplicated effort.](https://fathom.video/share/fRd3yGsxAabJwJy2ybJ_BN5AhvSijTUu?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [Sydney will own the creation of all Sprint ME training modules.](https://fathom.video/share/fRd3yGsxAabJwJy2ybJ_BN5AhvSijTUu?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)
  - [Marisol will focus on Growth Execution ME training, which has a different, cycle-based workflow (weekly, monthly, quarterly).](https://fathom.video/share/fRd3yGsxAabJwJy2ybJ_BN5AhvSijTUu?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)

### Solution: New Sprint ME Workflow & Timeline

  - [A new Sprint ME timeline, led by William, is in development to integrate MEs into strategy and accelerate content delivery.](https://fathom.video/share/fRd3yGsxAabJwJy2ybJ_BN5AhvSijTUu?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**Key Changes:**](https://fathom.video/share/fRd3yGsxAabJwJy2ybJ_BN5AhvSijTUu?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [**Strategy Collaboration:** MEs now contribute to strategy (80% EM, 20% ME) to improve alignment and investment.](https://fathom.video/share/fRd3yGsxAabJwJy2ybJ_BN5AhvSijTUu?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
      - [**Accelerated Delivery:**](https://fathom.video/share/fRd3yGsxAabJwJy2ybJ_BN5AhvSijTUu?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
          - [Week 3 → 3 articles](https://fathom.video/share/fRd3yGsxAabJwJy2ybJ_BN5AhvSijTUu?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
          - [Week 4 → 5 articles](https://fathom.video/share/fRd3yGsxAabJwJy2ybJ_BN5AhvSijTUu?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
      - [**Pre-Kickoff Artifacts:** MEs must create customer artifacts and check the Atlas workspace the week before kickoff.](https://fathom.video/share/fRd3yGsxAabJwJy2ybJ_BN5AhvSijTUu?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
      - [**Atlas Workspace Setup:** Tammy creates standard workspaces. MEs must ping Tammy for customizations or if a workspace is missing by W1.](https://fathom.video/share/fRd3yGsxAabJwJy2ybJ_BN5AhvSijTUu?tab=summary&timestamp=963.0)
      - [**EM Strategy Loom:** EMs now create a Loom video of their strategy to share with the team.](https://fathom.video/share/fRd3yGsxAabJwJy2ybJ_BN5AhvSijTUu?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)

### Implementation: Notion Structure

  - [Sydney will create a "SprintME" group in the `Training Modules` database to house the new content.](https://fathom.video/share/fRd3yGsxAabJwJy2ybJ_BN5AhvSijTUu?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)
  - [Marisol will duplicate the existing EM template and filter it for ME-specific content.](https://fathom.video/share/fRd3yGsxAabJwJy2ybJ_BN5AhvSijTUu?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Sydney:**](https://fathom.video/share/fRd3yGsxAabJwJy2ybJ_BN5AhvSijTUu?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)
      - [Finalize the Sprint ME timeline with William.](https://fathom.video/share/fRd3yGsxAabJwJy2ybJ_BN5AhvSijTUu?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
      - [Create all Sprint ME training modules in the "SprintME" Notion group.](https://fathom.video/share/fRd3yGsxAabJwJy2ybJ_BN5AhvSijTUu?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)
  - [**Marisol:**](https://fathom.video/share/fRd3yGsxAabJwJy2ybJ_BN5AhvSijTUu?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
      - [Update existing Sprint EM training documents to reflect the new process.](https://fathom.video/share/fRd3yGsxAabJwJy2ybJ_BN5AhvSijTUu?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
      - [Create Growth Execution ME training content.](https://fathom.video/share/fRd3yGsxAabJwJy2ybJ_BN5AhvSijTUu?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
      - [Meet with Leah (tomorrow) to discuss the new Sprint project management board.](https://fathom.video/share/fRd3yGsxAabJwJy2ybJ_BN5AhvSijTUu?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)

Confirm w/ William Sprint ME timeline/strategy; then finalize overview, add Phase 1 checkpoint, share w/ Marisol
Create Sprint ME modules in Claude team; then add to Training Modules DB under SprintME group
Duplicate EM template; filter for Sprint MEs
